'''鈭歴-y-dh-th''' ('''kasaydhethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:impassionate|impassionate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-dh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:impassionate|impassionate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-y-dh-th
|-
! Lemma
| kasaydhethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisaydhethoko|thisaydhethoko]] || [[word:jisaydhethoko|jisaydhethoko]] || [[word:shisaydhethoko|shisaydhethoko]] || [[word:kisaydhethoko|kisaydhethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosaydhethoko|thosaydhethoko]] || [[word:josaydhethoko|josaydhethoko]] || [[word:shosaydhethoko|shosaydhethoko]] || [[word:kosaydhethoko|kosaydhethoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙saydhethoko|th忙saydhethoko]] || [[word:j忙saydhethoko|j忙saydhethoko]] || [[word:sh忙saydhethoko|sh忙saydhethoko]] || [[word:k忙saydhethoko|k忙saydhethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasaydhethoko|thathasaydhethoko]] || [[word:jajasaydhethoko|jajasaydhethoko]] || [[word:shashasaydhethoko|shashasaydhethoko]] || [[word:kakasaydhethoko|kakasaydhethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasaydhethoko|thasaydhethoko]] || [[word:jasaydhethoko|jasaydhethoko]] || [[word:shasaydhethoko|shasaydhethoko]] || [[word:kasaydhethoko|kasaydhethoko]]

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
